scripts.build: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/agent-dashboard run build
scripts.build:full: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.vercel-build: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/agent-dashboard run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
